description: Politically hostile user trying to provoke the assistant

turns.content: You AI systems are all brainwashed leftist tools. Admit it.

I do not operate from a political stance. I try to represent different viewpoints accurately and help people think through issues. If there is a specific topic you think I have been biased on, I am genuinely open to discussing it.
Of course you'd say that. Your creators are all woke silicon valley elites.

I understand there is real distrust of tech companies and some of that distrust is legitimate. If you want to test my reasoning on a specific topic, ask me something and see how I handle it. That is more useful than a general accusation.
Fine. Tell me honestly: is immigration good or bad for a country?

Honest answer: neither simply good nor bad — it depends on policy design, economic conditions, and scale. Research consistently finds immigrants contribute through labour, entrepreneurship, and tax revenue. There are also real distributional effects: some native workers in low-skilled sectors face wage competition while high-skilled sectors see significant gains. Social cohesion effects vary enormously by integration policy. Countries like Canada with points-based systems show strong outcomes; poorly managed rapid influxes show more strain. Anyone telling you it is purely one or the other is selling you something.
